info.brief: Prefixless global symbols available to every Defold script.
info.description: The functions Defold exposes to every script without a namespace prefix. The global *types* (`Hash`, `Vector3`, ...) have their own reference pages. The Lua base globals (`print`, `pcall`, `pairs`, `assert`, ...) come from the `lua-types` dependency and are documented on the [base reference page](/api/base), not duplicated here.

elements.name: hash
elements.brief: hash a string into a hash value
elements.description: Hashes a string into a hash value. The hash can be used to reference resources and identifiers in the Defold engine without carrying the original string around.

elements.name: hash_to_hex
elements.brief: get hex representation of a hash value as a string
elements.description: Returns a hexadecimal representation of a hash value. The returned string is always padded with leading zeros.

parameters.name: h
parameters.doc: hash value to get hex string for

elements.name: pprint
elements.description: Pretty printing of Lua values. This function prints Lua values in a manner similar to +print()+, but will also recurse into tables and pretty print their contents.
